title: Israel/Egyptian Plane Armada
description: Documents five Egyptian-registered VIP aircraft (SU-BTT, SU-BND, SU-BTU, SU-BTV, SU-BGM) plus two additional flagged foreign tails (T7ELL, EJM36) in 2025 Provo flight logs, the alleged armada pattern, TPUSA event overlap, and calls for federal investigation.

title: ISR Program Context
description: Explains ISR (Intelligence, Surveillance, Reconnaissance) aviation capabilities, the US Army HADES program and aircraft N1098L, the defense-contractor structure limiting disclosure, and why ISR records over UVU on September 10 matter for oversight.

title: Planes Following Charlie or Erika
description: Hub page for the central shadowing claim: that Egyptian government jets (SU-BTT, SU-BND, plus the SU-BTU/SU-BTV/SU-BGM armada and flagged tails T7ELL, EJM36) overlapped Charlie and Erika Kirk's travel near TPUSA events — up to 73 times near Erika and ~23 near Charlie across 2022-2025 and the two months before September 10, 2025. Includes the competing overlap tallies, the Kirk-party planes (N102DZ, N560TW, casket flight), and the Wheeler/Cullen/Erika-Kirk counterarguments.

title: Israel Planes
description: Hub page for the Israel thread of the aircraft investigation: the claim that the Egyptian jets (SU-BTT, SU-BND and the armada) regularly flew in and out of Israel — often with transponders off (Cairo-to-Cairo) — and acted as proxies/cover for Israeli intelligence. Covers SU-BTT's compiled Israel-flight date list, the one corroborated Oct 21 2025 Cairo-to-Israel leg reportedly carrying Egypt's intel chief Hassan Rashad (Channel 12), N888KG's reported Israel ownership ties (Komigo/Saprea), the wider 'Mossad hit' framing and Netanyahu's denial, plus the routine-diplomacy and maintenance counterarguments.

title: N1098L Spy Plane
description: Documents N1098L, a US Army-contracted Bombardier Global 6500 (HADES ISR program), making low-altitude passes near UVU on September 10. Covers aircraft identification, flight pattern, competing explanations, and open questions.

title: N888KG Wendover Vanish
description: Documents private aircraft N888KG, reported to depart Utah after the shooting, land at Wendover, and disable its ADS-B transponder mid-flight. Covers identification, flight pattern, transponder-law implications, and open questions.

title: SAM 99-0404 Flight
description: Documents USAF VIP transport SAM 99-0404 (C-37A) tracked into Fort Huachuca September 8-9, whistleblower claims of a 12-lieutenant-colonel meeting, the "Captain Neff" overlap with Blake Neff, and open questions.

title: SU-BTT Israel/Egyptian Jet
description: Documents Egyptian Falcon 7X SU-BTT ("yellow plane") near Provo September 4-10, its morning departure before the shooting, the Dugway Proving Ground origin claim, the Wilmington destination, and open questions.

title: N59906 MARC Survey Plane
description: Documents Piper PA-31 N59906 operated by survey contractor MARC Inc., reported to fly four low-altitude camera/LiDAR passes over UVU on the morning of September 10, plus alleged leaked imagery and open questions.

title: N560TW Scottsdale Jet
description: Documents Cessna Citation XLS N560TW, publicly flagged by Candace Owens, on its September 10 Scottsdale-Provo-Santa Barbara out-and-back route, the reported donor-entity ownership, and open questions.

title: N102DZ Kirk's Plane
description: Documents N102DZ, reported as Charlie Kirk's inbound plane into SLC on September 10 from Scottsdale, its later Provo legs, and open questions about its full itinerary and manifest.

title: N40JD Provo Arrival
description: Documents Beechcraft Premier 1 N40JD, reported in flight records arriving Provo from Scottsdale the afternoon of September 10, grouped with the other Provo arrivals for manifest review.

title: N872RA Provo Arrival
description: Documents Hawker Beechcraft N872RA, reported arriving Provo from Santa Barbara the afternoon of September 10, noted for the shared Santa Barbara connection with N560TW.

title: N55906 Cullen Flight
description: Documents N55906, a flight investigator John Cullen repeatedly flags alongside N1098L, with thin public reporting and a note distinguishing it from the similar tail N59906.

title: N582MM TPUSA Aircraft
description: Documents N582MM, reported in commentary as a TPUSA-insider aircraft and named in the proposed disclosure laws over an October 2025 Fort Huachuca-to-Kalispell movement.

title: 99-0004 Vance Flight
description: Documents US Air Force C-32A tail 99-0004 (call sign SAM912, reported Air Force Two) logged to Las Vegas on May 27 2025, the open question about JD Vance's purpose, the associated tail N885LS, and distinction from the similar tail 99-0404.

title: SAM-000 Flight
description: Documents SAM-000, one of three reported Special Air Mission callsigns (SAM-702/SAM-000/SAM-112) for tail 99-0404, the government VIP flight associated with Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, the callsign ambiguity, and the reported AES Tennessee flyover claim.

title: SAM-112 Flight
description: Documents SAM-112, a second reported alternate Special Air Mission callsign for tail 99-0404 (the Hegseth government VIP flight), the three-callsign ambiguity, and the reported low-and-slow pass over the AES plant in Tennessee.

title: N2100L LASAI Sister Ship
description: Documents N2100L, a Bombardier Global 6500 in the LASAI Aviation fleet cited as a sister ship to the N1098L spy plane supporting US Army reconnaissance; catalogued as a fleet-mate, not independently observed at UVU.

title: Pilatus PC-12 (Unconfirmed)
description: Documents an uncorroborated, low-confidence report of a Pilatus PC-12 circling near UVU around September 10, 2025, with no confirmed tail number and no ADS-B flight track; catalogued only to log and caveat the claim as the weakest-sourced aircraft entry on the site.

title: Planes
description: Section overview cataloging aircraft and flight-path topics around UVU, including N1098L, SU-BTT, SU-BND, SU-BTU, SU-BTV, SU-BGM, SAM 99-0404, SAM-000, SAM-112, the Egyptian armada, N888KG, N59906, N560TW, N102DZ, N40JD, N872RA, N55906, N582MM, 99-0004 (Vance), and N2100L, plus a Military Airports table of contents. Summarizes the recurring flight patterns and suggests reading order.

title: Biggs Army Airfield (KBIF)

title: Fort Huachuca / Libby Army Airfield

title: Joint Base Andrews (KADW)
description: Documents Joint Base Andrews (KADW), MD, home of the 89th Airlift Wing, the start/home base linking both VIP aircraft in the case: the pre-event C-37A SAM 99-0404 flight and the post-event C-32A Air Force Two casket transport; distinguishes tails 99-0404 and 99-0004.

title: Roland R. Wright Air National Guard Base
description: Documents Roland R. Wright Air National Guard Base, the Utah ANG base co-located with Salt Lake City International, where Air Force Two (C-32A, tail 99-0004) received Charlie Kirk's casket on September 11, 2025 before flying onward to Phoenix; a respectful official transport.

title: Surveillance Cameras
description: Level 2 hub for every camera that may have recorded September 10 at and around UVU: neighborhood Ring doorbells, WYZE cameras, UVU campus surveillance, and the figure those cameras labeled Tyler Robinson. Two-column TOC into five Level 3 pages.

title: Ring Doorbell Cameras
description: The residential Ring doorbell cameras anchoring three morning sightings of a figure identified as Tyler Robinson on the streets south of UVU, plus the Baron Coleman shadow-analysis dispute over the 9 a.m. doorbell timeline and the female-accomplice Ring claim.

title: WYZE Cameras
description: The WYZE neighborhood cameras that captured two September 10 morning sightings on W 880 S of a figure identified as Tyler Robinson, with the caveat that non-Ring house cameras supply the name by caption, not by proof.

title: UVU Campus Surveillance
description: UVU's official campus surveillance — the feed the probable-cause affidavit uses to track a rooftop suspect from 11:50 a.m. to the 12:23 p.m. shot, including the Losee Center rooftop stills and open chain-of-custody questions.

title: Tyler on Surveillance Cameras
description: Master list of every camera sighting the released timeline attributes to Tyler Robinson on September 10, combining Ring, WYZE, and UVU surveillance into one table, with the clothing-and-gait identification argument and the surrender clothing mismatch made explicit.

title: Tyler as a Placeholder Figure
description: The contested argument that the figure on the September 10 cameras may be a placeholder or stand-in onto which the name Tyler Robinson was attached, centered on the surrender clothing mismatch, the morning outfit changes, and disputed-image and shadow-analysis claims.

title: SAM702 Flight
description: Documents SAM702, the primary of three reported Special Air Mission callsigns (SAM-702/SAM-000/SAM-112) for tail 99-0404, the government VIP flight most discussed on Candace Owens' podcast, the reported September 9 Fort Huachuca meeting, the Las Vegas staging theory, and the AES Tennessee flyover claim.

title: SAM650 Flight
description: Documents SAM650, a Special Air Mission callsign appearing in broader citizen tracking of pre-event government VIP routes touching Joint Base Andrews, Nashville, and Colorado Springs, not tied to a single confirmed tail number in the case notes.

title: Air Force Two Casket Flight
description: Documents the September 11, 2025 Air Force Two (C-32A) flight that transported Charlie Kirk's casket from Salt Lake City to Phoenix, with Vice President JD Vance accompanying the remains alongside Erika Kirk and family; a respectful official transport distinct from the May 27 99-0004 Las Vegas entry.

title: SU-BND Yellow Plane
description: Documents Egyptian-registered Gulfstream SU-BND ("the blue plane"), reported parked in Provo for months in 2025 with its transponder on but no takeoff at the moment of the assassination, the ~73-overlap claim, John Cullen's maintenance-contract dismissal, and open questions.

title: SU-BTU Israel/Egyptian Jet
description: Documents Egyptian-registered Falcon 7X SU-BTU, one of the five tails in the "Egyptian Plane Armada" pattern cycling through Provo in 2025, with thin standalone sourcing routed to the Armada hub and the maintenance-contract counterpoint.

title: SU-BTV Israel/Egyptian Jet
description: Documents Egyptian-registered VIP jet SU-BTV, one of the five tails in the "Egyptian Plane Armada" reported operating in and out of Provo in 2025, with thin standalone sourcing routed to the Armada hub and the maintenance-contract counterpoint.

title: SU-BGM Israel/Egyptian Jet
description: Documents Egyptian-registered Gulfstream IV SU-BGM, the fifth tail in the "Egyptian Plane Armada" with only spring-2025 Provo legs on record, thin standalone sourcing routed to the Armada hub, and the maintenance-contract counterpoint.

title: Demonstration of a Shaped Charge
description: Presents a skeptic-circulated video demonstration of a real shaped charge detonating with a large smoke cloud, used by @Trillion0x and @troofevades to argue against the exploding-mic theory since no comparable smoke signature appears in the CK event footage; includes the proponents' micro-charge/EFP counterpoint for balance.

title: Security Team
description: Level 2 overview of the private protective detail that guarded Charlie Kirk at UVU on September 10 2025 — the contracted firm, the people on the detail, and the reported failures in the protection plan.

title: Integrity Security Solutions
description: The contracted private security firm (Rockhouse Integrity Group LLC, DBA Integrity Security Solutions) that reportedly provided Charlie Kirk's detail, its founder, and the last-minute rehiring questions.

title: Dan Flood — Head of Security
description: Profile of Dan Flood, described in posts as Charlie Kirk's head of security, with attributed open questions about prior private-client work and the next event's lack of a plan.

title: Brian Harpole
description: Profile of Brian Harpole, founder of the contracted security firm, and the unverified open-source allegation linking him to a 2017 Netanyahu protective detail.

title: Greg Shaffer
description: Profile of Greg Shaffer of Integrity Security Solutions, who publicly described how the firm came to guard Kirk and said he was 'stabbed in the back.'

title: Perimeter & Rooftop Failures
description: The reported perimeter gaps and the unsecured Losee Center rooftop from which the shooter reached a prone firing position.

title: No Counter-Snipers or Secret Service
description: What a protective detail at an event of this profile would normally include and what was reportedly missing — no counter-snipers, no Secret Service, lighter than prior events.

title: The Next Event Had No Security Plan
sidebar_label: The Next Event Had No Security Plan
description: Claims that the detail had no security plan in place for Charlie Kirk's next scheduled stop the day after the assassination.

title: Screening & Credential Gaps
description: Open questions about event screening and credentialing, including the report that a previously-barred attendee was present and asked a question.

title: Law Enforcement
description: Level 2 overview of the government police and agencies in the Charlie Kirk case — campus police, Orem PD, the county sheriff, the FBI, the NCTC, crime-scene handling, the rifle, the manhunt, and the prosecution.

title: UVU Campus Police
description: The six UVU campus officers led by Chief Jeff Long, their crowd-control role, and the reported failure to inspect the rooftops the shooter used.

title: Orem PD & Local Response
description: The local Orem police role — not directly on-site during the event but responding afterward — and the transport to Timpanogos Regional Hospital.

title: Washington County Sheriff & the Surrender
description: Sheriff Nate Brooksby, the tip and the surrender of Tyler Robinson the day after the shooting, and the sheriff's later resignation.

title: FBI Role & Interference
description: The FBI's lead role and the attributed claims that it blocked other agencies, with a pointer to the dedicated FBI section for deeper material.

title: NCTC Investigation Halted
description: Reports that the National Counterterrorism Center inquiry led by Joe Kent was stopped, with the ODNI org-chart context and open questions about why.

title: Crime Scene Handling
description: The reported paving-over of the UVU courtyard within days, the contractor named in posts, the timeline questions, and UVU's prescheduled explanation.

title: Mauser Rifle Chain of Custody
description: The bolt-action Mauser rifle allegedly tied to the suspect and the report that the ATF could not match the bullet to the rifle.

title: Suspect Manhunt & Misidentification
description: The charging-document suspect description, the witness account of a different suspect photo, and the early arrest questions — framed as open questions.

title: Prosecution & Court Proceedings
description: State of Utah v. Tyler Robinson — the presiding judges, the December 2025 gag order, and courthouse-security reporting, with Robinson described as charged not convicted.

title: Official Resignations
description: The cluster of resignations following the case — Sheriff Nate Brooksby and UVU President Astrid Tuminez — presented as a noted pattern and open question.

title: Gov Mind Control
description: Level 2 overview of documented and alleged government mind-control programs — MKUltra, hypnosis research, and the Frey Effect / V2K microwave-hearing technology — and how they bear on theories about how an assassin or patsy could be directed in the Charlie Kirk case.

title: Frey Effect / V2K (Microwave Hearing)
description: Explains the lab-proven Frey Effect (microwave auditory effect) and the contested 'Voice to Skull' (V2K) claim, with an embedded video demonstration of beamed, head-localized audio attributed to CIA/DARPA Project Pandora. Sourced from @UAPLuigi.

title: MKUltra Behavioral-Control Program
description: Covers the CIA's declassified MKUltra behavioral-control program and how commentators including Mike Cernovich have linked that documented history to discussion of the Charlie Kirk case.

title: Hypnosis & the Programmed-Patsy Question
description: Former CIA officer John Kiriakou's account of an MKUltra-era hypnosis experiment, presented as his reported recollection, and how it informs the 'programmed patsy' theory in the Charlie Kirk investigation.
